calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust Based On Changed Circumstances Pursuant To Probate Code Seciton 15409(A) Or, In The Alternative, To Replace Independent Trust
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Vecino for William Orrick III. Richard Bryan for Martha Lyddon.

Each party presented argument to support their respective position. Discussions regarding changed circumstance were held. Mr. Vecino stated that they are seeking a permanent solution, that Mr Bryan's client seeks to "divorce" her Brother, and that they don't think that Martha was meant to be the gatekeeper. Mr. Bryan responded as set forth on the record. At the conclusion of argument, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Nici Rodich, CSR #11604. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
